spec.name: Soul Bind Point
spec.summary: Anchors soul thermal flux as a point focus at touch reach, targeting a marked signature with long timed hold by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Anchors soul thermal flux as a point focus at touch reach, targeting a marked signature with long timed hold by changing existing conditions.
